rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Elec. Code §271.008, which governs ballot box usage in joint elections.
quote: One set of ballot boxes may be used at a common polling place in a joint election for the deposit of all the ballots for each of the participating political subdivisions.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election ballot boxes, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
